name: Boston Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
Place bacon in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover and microwave on high for 4 to 5 minutes, or until crisp. Remove bacon, crumble, and set aside.
Drain clams and add liquid to bacon drippings. Stir in potatoes and onion. Cover and microwave on high for 9 to 12 minutes, or until potatoes soften.
Stir flour into half the milk. Add flour mixture and remaining milk, cream, clams, salt, and pepper to hot liquid. Cover and microwave for an additional 4 to 5 minutes.
Garnish with butter, oyster crackers, and crumbled bacon before serving.
